name: Cheese and Beef Ball
recipeIngredient: 2 packages (3 oz) chopped shredded dried beef
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all the ingredients in a large bowl and mix well.
2. Shape the mixture into a ring or ball.
3. Serve with crackers or party breads.
4. Alternatively, shape into two balls and roll in pecans.
5. Store any leftovers for later use.
